title: A Woman
overview: Juliane, a police commissioner in Paris, is a woman with great moral integrity. But when she discovers her husband’s double life, she starts committing acts she never would have thought herself capable of.

trailers.title: Bande annonce officielle d'Une femme de notre temps de Jean Paul Civeyrac
